summary: Iteration 24 - Backend Agent Workspace + Delegation/Official Action System Testing Complete. All 19 tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) GET /api/practices/{id}/workspace returns full workspace data with current_agent, current_activity, completed_activities, next_activity, blockers, documents_summary, delegation, official_action, proof_layer, approval with father_review, timeline_summary, ui_guidance. (2) Workspace for draft practice returns current_activity with user_action_required=true and Italian label 'Inizia la pratica'. (3) official_action includes entity_name, submission_channel, can_herion_prepare, can_herion_submit. (4) documents_summary includes missing_count and missing_labels. (5) ui_guidance includes headline, subheadline, next_step_label, next_step_detail. (6) delegation state includes enabled, level, scope, scope_labels. (7) proof_layer includes expected and status. (8) Escalated practice returns blockers with severity. (9) Practice with agent_logs returns completed_activities. (10) POST /api/practices/{id}/delegate grants delegation. (11) POST /api/practices/{id}/revoke-delegation revokes delegation. (12) POST /api/practices/{id}/proof registers receipt. (13) POST /api/practices/{id}/complete-official-step transitions practice status. (14) Delegation audit trail created in delegation_audit collection. (15) Auth login works with admin@aic.it / Admin123!. (16) Auth rejects wrong password. (17) Workspace for waiting_user_review status returns father_review.active=true with compatibility_check, requirements_check, approval_recommendation. (18) Practice creation includes delegation and proof_layer fields in workspace. (19) Labels are human-readable Italian, not technical codes.
critical_code_review_comments: Workspace endpoint correctly returns all required fields: current_agent, current_activity, completed_activities, next_activity, blockers, documents_summary, delegation, official_action, proof_layer, approval, timeline_summary, ui_guidance
current_activity correctly uses Italian labels (e.g., 'Inizia la pratica' not 'start_practice')
official_action correctly includes entity_name, submission_channel, can_herion_prepare, can_herion_submit, requires_user_direct_step
Father review (build_father_review) correctly activates for waiting_user_review/waiting_approval status with compatibility_check, requirements_check, approval_recommendation
Delegation endpoints correctly create audit trail in delegation_audit collection
Blockers correctly include severity field for escalated/blocked practices
scope_labels correctly maps technical scope codes to Italian labels using DELEGATION_SCOPES dict
seed_data_creation: Used existing practices: 98cf9182-e7df-4b73-a2e4-1c69775e7caa (draft vat_registration), d9c4fca6-a27d-4f97-a006-d191505549f9 (escalated with 12 agent_logs), 77f47f36-9eef-4d97-8ea8-337c0301ee19 (waiting_user_review for father review test). Created TEST_V24_Workspace_Client practice for delegation fields test (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested the new workspace + delegation + official action system. Key endpoints verified: (1) GET /api/practices/{id}/workspace - returns full workspace state with all required fields. (2) POST /api/practices/{id}/delegate - grants delegation with level/scope. (3) POST /api/practices/{id}/revoke-delegation - revokes delegation. (4) POST /api/practices/{id}/proof - uploads receipt/proof. (5) POST /api/practices/{id}/complete-official-step - marks official step completed. Father review activates when status is waiting_user_review/waiting_approval. Delegation audit goes to db.delegation_audit collection. All labels are human-readable Italian. Test practices: 98cf9182-e7df-4b73-a2e4-1c69775e7caa (draft), d9c4fca6-a27d-4f97-a006-d191505549f9 (escalated with 12 agent_logs), 77f47f36-9eef-4d97-8ea8-337c0301ee19 (waiting_user_review).
